title: Security Scanning Infrastructure
description: Implement comprehensive security scanning beyond GitHub Dependabot to ensure supply chain security, detect vulnerabilities early, enforce license compliance, and establish security best practices for the Jarvy project
acceptance_criteria: cargo-audit runs on every PR and fails on known CVEs
cargo-deny enforces license compliance (MIT/Apache/BSD allowed only)
Gitleaks scans for secrets in pre-commit and CI
Semgrep/CodeQL run SAST on Rust code
SBOM generated in SPDX and CycloneDX formats for releases
Pre-commit hooks available for local security checks

tasks.title: Configure cargo-deny
tasks.description: Create deny.toml with license, advisory, and ban policies
subtasks: Define allowed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD, ISC, Zlib, CC0, Unlicense, MPL-2.0)
Set unmaintained and yanked crate policies
Add any necessary exceptions with justification

tasks.title: Create security CI workflow
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/security.yml for PR and scheduled scans
subtasks: Add cargo-audit job for CVE scanning
Add cargo-deny job for license/advisory/ban checks
Add Gitleaks job for secret scanning
Add Semgrep job with Rust security rules
Add CodeQL job for semantic analysis
Configure SARIF upload for GitHub Security tab

tasks.title: Configure Gitleaks
tasks.description: Create .gitleaks.toml with custom rules and allowlist
subtasks: Extend default rules for Jarvy-specific patterns
Add custom rule for API keys
Configure allowlist for docs and config examples

tasks.title: Create SECURITY.md
tasks.description: Document security policy and vulnerability reporting

tasks.title: Add release signing with Sigstore
tasks.description: Sign release artifacts with cosign keyless signing
subtasks: Add cosign-installer step to release workflow
Document signature verification in release notes

tasks.title: Add SBOM generation
tasks.description: Generate SPDX and CycloneDX SBOMs for releases
subtasks: Create helper script for local SBOM generation

tasks.title: Create OpenSSF Scorecard workflow
tasks.description: Set up weekly Scorecard analysis and badge
subtasks: Create scorecard workflow with weekly schedule

tasks.title: Add cargo-geiger unsafe audit
tasks.description: Run unsafe code detection as advisory check
subtasks: Add cargo-geiger job to security workflow

tasks.title: Create pre-commit configuration
tasks.description: Set up pre-commit hooks for local security checks
subtasks: Add cargo fmt and clippy hooks

tasks.title: Configure branch protection
tasks.description: Document and recommend branch protection rules
subtasks: Add GitHub Secret Scanning enablement guide

implementation_notes.sigstore: Uses keyless signing via OIDC - requires id-token: write permission
implementation_notes.gitleaks: Requires fetch-depth: 0 for full history scanning
implementation_notes.codeql: Rust support requires building the project during analysis
implementation_notes.sbom: cargo-sbom and cargo-cyclonedx may be flaky; fallback to cargo metadata + jq

risks.mitigation: Allowlist with justification, separate advisory vs blocking checks
Caching, parallel execution, separate workflow for heavy scans
Daily scans, rapid response process documented
